title: Alumni webinars
content: Alumni webinars "CRISPR/Cas Systems- A powerful tool for crop improvement" by Dr Ira Vashisht on 15th Sep,2021 Career Guidance by Alumni Sehaj Singh Gulati Preparations and Scopes for Higher Education in India and Overseas by Alumni Mansi Arora Methodologies and Modalities for Higher Education at Overseas by Alumni Sushain Kaul Industry and research experience shared by Alumni Sahil Sethi Modes and Modalities of Higher Education in India and for IITs by Alumni Gaurav Bhatt FAIR DATA PRINCIPLES, FAIR GENOMICS AND X-RAY OMICS INTEGRATION By Alumni Dr Gurnoor Singh
